query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A band performs on a small indoor stage. A drummer sits behind a drum kit with cymbals on the left side of the frame. In the center, a vocalist wearing a red bandana and dark clothing stands near a microphone. To the right, a guitarist with long hair faces away from the camera toward an amplifier. Bright lights shine from behind the performers at the rear of the stage, and a sign is visible on the wall to the left of the drummer.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A band performs on a small indoor stage with extreme exposure that blows out the background lights and crushes the performers into deep shadow. A drummer sits behind a drum kit with cymbals on the left. In the center, a vocalist wearing a red bandana stands near a microphone, partially illuminated. To the right, a guitarist with long hair faces away from the camera, rendered nearly as a complete silhouette against the overexposed stage lights. The severe contrast creates a raw, graphic atmosphere with lost detail in both highlights and shadows.
